title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask

title: Final Fantasy VII Remake
review: To an OG Final Fantasy fan, FF7 Remake is an insult. Although the graphics are beautiful and the story is expanded upon, the gameplay is a huge downgrade...

title: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
review: When the survival horror genre was dying out, Resident Evil 7 marked the great revival for the genre. Capcom overhauled their formula and created a new unique style of resident evil we hadn't seen before.
